posts.text:
I heard I have a cameo appearance in Louis Theroux's latest documentary.

Has anyone seen it? What's the context?

posts.text: 'Mental health' isn't a good excuse to be a bad person.
posts.quote: 'Mental health' isn't a good excuse to be a bad person.

posts.text: With rare exceptions, engaging heavily in politics makes people worse, not better.
posts.quote: With rare exceptions, engaging heavily in politics makes people worse, not better.

posts.text: Sometimes, people intentionally fail to understand things because understanding them would cause them to question their worldview.
posts.quote: Sometimes, people intentionally fail to understand things because understanding them would cause them to question their worldview.

posts.text: Current propaganda levels internationally are rivalling March 2020.
posts.quote: Current propaganda levels internationally are rivalling March 2020.

posts.text: I have never lost a friend over politics because none of my friends were wet wipes to begin with.
posts.quote: I have never lost a friend over politics because none of my friends were wet wipes to begin with.

posts.text:
Dubai has a reputation of making people 'soft' but I've found its residents to be more resilient than many would assume.

Nobody LIKES having 1,500+ missiles & drones lobbed at them, yet life goes on and people look out for each other.

I doubt most cities would handle this well.
